word: H3071 - יְהֹוָה נִסִּי - Yᵉhôvâh niççîy - yeh-ho-vaw' nis-see' - Jehovah-nissi

sections.paragraph:
יהוה נסּי - yehôvâh nissı̂y - yeh-ho-vaw' nis-see'

From H3068 and H5251 with pronominal suffix.; Jehovah (is) my banner; Jehovah-Nissi, a symbolical name of an altar in the Desert: - Jehovah-nissi.
